about: Design recipe ledger for all mockups. Newest entries FIRST. Before building any mockup: run `node ledger-check.js` (or read the last 10 entries) — any displayFont, paletteFamily, or loaderConcept used in the last 10 entries is OFF the table for the new build. After building: append the new entry in the same commit as the mockup. Backfilled entries (pre 2026-06-09) have null block codes because the data wasn't recorded at build time.

entries.flourish: dovetail-joint loader (two wood-grain boards slide together and mesh, micro-seat settle) reusing the loader-lab dovetail-lock concept in a cedar/petrol palette; tape-measure tick-mark section labels; ghost set-out hairlines on the deep CTA band
entries.seed:
SEED - Geva Construction, Cardiff & South Wales (carpenter/building contractor going more commercial: NEW BUILDS, EXTENSIONS, structural carpentry, commercial fit-outs; owner Gareth Evans, business name Geva = Gareth Evans). Stock-photo build, no logo/photos/website/email supplied. Phone 07539 357713 / WhatsApp 447539357713; no email -> email info card omitted (phone/WhatsApp/form only). CTAs default to 'Call us' (Gareth/Geva not confirmed public-facing, per no-inferred-owner-names rule).
Palette: stone-white #f5f6f4 + deep teal-ink #13211f + PETROL-TEAL accent #0e6f68 + cedar-tan secondary #b9803f + deep-teal band #102624. Bright surface (house rule), distinct from banned cool-stone+pine-green+brass (this is blue-green teal + cedar, not pine+brass).
Type: Schibsted Grotesk 800/900 display (architectural, confident; clears banned-10 and the carpentry-saturated Zilla Slab) + Inter body. Monogram = teal rounded square with white/cedar A-frame roofline mark.
Archetype: C-leaning but BRIGHT (photo-led premium on stone-white). Hero = H2 split, finished contemporary new-build photo right + 'Domestic & Commercial' badge.
Signature: dovetail-joint loader (reuses loader-lab #ld-dove concept - cooldown clear, nicyai's dovetail is well outside last-10 - re-skinned in cedar wood-grain + petrol/deep-teal bg, NOT black+green). One flourish.
Stock photos (Pexels, no people, all human-checked UK-reading): hero 323781 (stone+timber+glass new build); gallery G3 scroll = 4692281 (UK rear extension + steel beam, very British), 8491084 (cut roof trusses blue sky), 8817834 (timber stud frame first fix), 30580640 (finished render new-build pair), 8817839 (rafters detail), 5484744 (structural roof refurb). Rejected 34640157 & 1124926 (foreign/favela tells), 8830259 & 2098624 (people visible).
Voice: commercial 'first fix to handover', 3 R1 Google-styled reviews naming Geva + Cardiff-area (Cyncoed/Cardiff Bay/Penarth) + specific job (extension / commercial fit-out / loft). Slim about block AFTER gallery.
Areas: Cardiff (home) + Penarth, Barry, Cowbridge, Caerphilly, Newport, Bridgend, Pontypridd, Llantrisant, Vale of Glamorgan.
Ledger ok: Schibsted Grotesk, stone-white+petrol-teal+cedar, dovetail loader, H2+S2+G3 combo - all clear of last 10.
TO CONFIRM with client: exact base/postcode within Cardiff, working hours (Mon-Fri 7:30-5:30 assumed), CSCS/insurance levels, whether to personalise CTAs as 'Call Gareth', email address.
Blocks: hero:H2 / services:S2 / gallery:G3 / reviews:R1 / trust:T1 / contact:C1
entries.blocks: hero:H2 / services:S2 / gallery:G3 / reviews:R1 / trust:T1 / contact:C1

entries.flourish: crenellated tower monogram logo + loader 'tower blocks' stacking bottom-up; roofline hairline divider
entries.seed: SIBLING (by explicit client request) of westwood-building-services recipe, for Tower Construction, Selby/North Yorkshire, builder, over 25 years. Patrick asked to make it 'similar to westwood'. Same cool-white+stone+pine-green(#1f4034)+brass(#b08b4f) palette, Plus Jakarta/Inter, H5 hero/S2 services/G2 gallery/T1 trust/C1 contact, roofline divider. Differences: NEW tower-turret SVG logo (logo.svg + logo-white.svg), loader flourish changed from 'windows lit' to 'tower blocks stacking', GA tags stripped, REAL client photos (chimney/bathrooms/patio/loft/roof/garden wall), REAL Facebook reviews (Daniella Dennis + one ambiguous-name homeowner) + Facebook-recommended callout card, no email supplied so email card dropped (WhatsApp+phone+form), Selby-area towns. Ledger note: Westwood-recipe reuse is deliberate per client request; not a fatigue precedent.
entries.blocks: westwood-recipe sibling: hero:H5 / services:S2 / gallery:G2 / reviews:R1 / trust:T1 / contact:C1

entries.flourish: centred TH serif monogram badge (green ring + plane-bar motif)
entries.seed: CLONE (by explicit client request) of live client recipe holdstock-carpentry for TH Carpentry & Joinery, Tyler Harney, Morecambe/Lancashire, est. 2020 (6yrs). White + emerald-green (#00bf63), Newsreader/Inter. NOT a fresh design - Patrick asked to 'do it like holdstock carpentry'. Differences from holdstock: new TH monogram logo.svg, GA tags stripped, email card swapped for WhatsApp (no email supplied), Morecambe/Lancashire copy + areas, phone 07985 235559 / WhatsApp 447985235559. Ledger note: green+Newsreader recipe deliberately reused; do NOT treat as fatigue precedent for genuinely-new mockups.

entries.flourish: hazard-stripe strips + draw-on scaffold-tower SVG loader (couplers pop in) + yellow ghost wordmark behind CTA + steel-tube marquee
entries.seed:
SEED - EFA Scaffolding Services, East & South London (SCAFFOLDING: domestic/commercial/trade hire, chimney & roof access; owner Efe Atori, just starting up, 07507 952399 / WhatsApp 447507952399). DELIBERATE REUSE of the oxley-scaffolding recipe at the client's explicit request ('do the same mockup as Oxley had, redo it for this fella') - this OVERRIDES the palette/font/loader cooldown (Anton + hazard-yellow are in the banned-10 from oxley + others, knowingly reused). Not a fresh design.
Palette: near-black #0e1014 bg + steel greys + hazard-yellow #fbcc1f accent (Oxley's exact scheme).
Type: Anton display (uppercase, condensed) + Inter body. ems are colour-accent only (font-style:normal) per no-italics rule.
Archetype: dark Archetype A technical. Hero = headline left on dark grid + a real scaffold-tower stock photo bled into the bg on the right (darkened gradient mask, hidden on mobile). Oxley had a faint SVG tower here; swapped for a Pexels photo because the client is just starting up and wanted stock photos.
Stock photos (Pexels, no people, UK feel): hero tall-tower (33903766); gallery = heritage debris-net wrap (36054139, feature), system stair tower (19563057), red-board platform (31745718), commercial facade (35155685), boarded-lift underside (154141). Added a Work/gallery section (G4 editorial, captions BELOW photos per house rule) that Oxley didn't have, to carry the stock photos.
Signature: scaffold-raise loader (4 standards draw bottom-up, ledgers + cross-braces, couplers pop, top boards) + hazard-stripe strips + yellow ghost 'EFA' behind CTA.
Voice: owner Efe named in CTAs ('Call Efe'/'WhatsApp Efe') - allowed because the business is literally his initials (EFA = Efe Atori), not an inferred name. Areas = 15 East+South London boroughs.
TO CONFIRM: base/yard location within E/S London, working hours (Mon-Sat 7-6 assumed), insurance levels (£2m PL assumed), email address (none provided - omitted).
Blocks: hero:H1(dark grid + photo bleed) / services:S4(2x2 bordered) / process:P (4-step) / gallery:G4(editorial, captions below) / areas:A(borough grid) / capability:T(8-cell) / contact:C(ghost wordmark) / loader:scaffold raise

entries.seed:
SEED - Cozma MD, Northamptonshire (GROUNDWORKS: footings/foundations, substructure brickwork to DPC, drainage, concrete & slabs/beam-and-block, dig & muck away, extension/outbuilding bases; works new-build housing developments + private. Owner Cristian Cozma, email cozmacristian1997@gmail.com, 07454 761531). 44 real client site photos (footings, substructure brick+block, drainage, slabs, beam&block, garage box) - all groundworks on new-build plots.
Palette: logo = dark olive-charcoal brick mark + bright leaf-green leaf on pale cream bg. House rule bans cream surfaces, so BG flipped to bright white + cool sage stone (#eef1ea), ink taken from the brick olive (#2b3124), accent = leaf green (#6fae33 / deep #4d8222 for text on white). Dark sections (trust/CTA/footer) use deep olive #262b1f to tie to the bricks. paletteFamily white+olive-charcoal+leaf-green - clear of last 10.
Type: Archivo 700-900 (structural/architectural wide grotesque, suits ground/foundations) + Inter body + DM Mono labels. None in the banned-10 (Outfit/Hanken/Geologica/Bricolage/Big Shoulders etc all avoided).
Archetype: bright photo-led (A-light x C-bright hybrid). Full-bleed H1 hero on a dramatic development site photo (substructure + scaffolded houses + plant + big sky), Ken Burns + dark left/bottom gradient for white text.
Signature: Coursework brick loader from loader-lab (ld-brick) recoloured to brand olive bricks w/ green cap course - on-brand twice over (brickwork trade + the logo's brick-wall mark). coursework not in last-10 loaders.
Voice: owner Cristian Cozma named only in the About/founder signature block (CC monogram); CTAs stay 'Get a quote'/'Call us' (no inferred-name CTA personalisation per house rule). No real third-party reviews exist, so 4 realistic reviews generated - 2 B2B (site manager Wellingborough, main contractor Kettering) + 2 domestic (Northampton extension, Daventry self-build) - naming the company, a Northants area and a specific groundworks service.
Ledger ok: combo H1+S4+G4 not in banned list; palette/font/loader all clear of the last 10.
Blocks: hero:H1(full-bleed) / services:S4(bento 12-col, dark feature card) / gallery:G4(editorial plate, captions below, big+tall tiles) / reviews:R1(2-col, no Google branding) / trust:T1(dark olive strip) / contact:C1 / loader:coursework

entries.flourish: water-fill loader (Revamp wordmark) + brass hairline frame
entries.seed: SEED - Revamp Property Services, Devon (kitchen & bathroom specialists; owner Lee Potts; new prospect, 07378110191, WhatsApp-only mobile, no email). DELIBERATE CLONE of the mastercraft-bathrooms mockup at the client's explicit request ('do it like mastercraft bathrooms one but include english kitchen stock images too' + follow-up 'dont worry about being distinct - make it like mastercraft'). Cooldown intentionally OVERRIDDEN per that instruction: Outfit display font, dark-bronze+gold palette and the water-fill loader are all currently in the 12-window but were reused verbatim because the brief is to match mastercraft, not differentiate. Same dark warm-black #14120f + brass #c8a05a/#e3c386 surface, Outfit 300/Inter body, water-fill brand reveal loader, hero-frame, numbered 2-col services, mosaic gallery, feature/about, CTA band, 3-col reviews, area chips, split contact. CHANGES vs mastercraft: positioned for BOTH kitchens and bathrooms - hero is a dark/brass fitted kitchen, gallery interleaves 3 English kitchens (Pexels 13722883/13722854/13722898 - dark brass-lit fitted kitchens, marble islands, no people, visually inspected; rejected 18285887 for a wall-mounted AC split unit reading non-UK) with 3 reused mastercraft luxury bathrooms (copper walk-in, dark marble en-suite, Calacatta freestanding); craft.jpg (brass tap) + band.jpg (marble bath) reused from mastercraft. Services rebalanced to kitchens+bathrooms (fitted kitchens, worktops & cabinetry, full bathrooms, wet rooms, en-suites, tiling, K&B design, plumbing). Devon areas (Exeter/Plymouth/Torquay/Newton Abbot/Exmouth/Tiverton + more). NO fabricated stats: dropped mastercraft's '25 years/600+ bathrooms' - hero badge is 'Free / Design visit & quote', feature stats are '2 trades one team / 1 point of contact / Free design & quote'. CTAs are 'Call us' NOT 'Call Lee' (owner-name CTA rule - name only appears in About + reviews). GA removed (prospect mockup, no tracking). Phone base64-obfuscated, WhatsApp 447378110191. Blocks: hero:H2 / trust:T1 / services:S4 / gallery:G3 / about+stats(LP) / band / reviews:R3 (5.0 local) / areas / contact:C1. FLAGS for the user: confirm base town within Devon (areas listed generically), confirm trading years before adding any year/number stat, confirm an email address (none supplied so contact is phone/WhatsApp/form only).

entries.flourish: spirit-level loader (loader-lab #13, pine-green) revealing the client's REAL logo + datum-line divider
entries.seed: SEED - J T Green General Builders & Resin Bound Installers, Somerton, Somerset (TA11; owner Justin Green, FMB approved 7yrs, fully insured £10m, 17 years in the trade). General builder: extensions (his speciality), renovations, new builds, groundworks, bricklaying & stonework, resin bound driveways, block paving/patios, kitchens & bathrooms. Moving to Devon later, kept Somerset-focused for now. Real details pulled from jtgreenbuilders.co.uk + FMB/Facebook (the .com in the brief was dead). Stock photos only, English, NO people - visually inspected every image; rejected continental hollow-block builds, US kitchen (range+toaster-oven+AC vent), South-Africa barred-window kitchen, dated blue continental bathroom. Archetype C Photo-led Premium but LIGHT surface (cool stone/white, charcoal ink #16201c, big photos) per bright-default rule. Palette: single deep pine-green accent #1f5e3f straight off the GREEN surname as the brand hook, on cool-stone white; warm sand #b08249 micro-accent only for the spirit-level bubble. Family cool-stone+pine-green, distinct from banned white+verde-green+chilli-red (single green, no second chilli colour). Type: Hanken Grotesk 700-900 display (0 ledger uses) + Inter body; no mono editorial labels, no italics. Signature: Spirit Level loader from loader-lab (#13 builder/general trades, NOT in cooldown), recoloured pine-green, bubble settles to centre then JT GREEN wordmark; datum-line hairline section divider + nav brand mark both echo the level baseline. Voice: Call/WhatsApp Justin (name public in reviews), FMB front and centre, resin bound surfaced as differentiator (it is in the business name), no invented 24/7. Ledger ok: Hanken Grotesk never used; cool-stone+pine-green new family; spirit level loader clears cooldown; combo H1+S4+G2 clears banned list. Blocks: hero:H1 / trust:T1 / services:S4 / gallery:G2 / about+T3 founder(JG) / reviews:R3 (2x2 local Somerset, no Google G - no confirmed rating) / areas(Somerton first) / cta band / contact:C1. UPDATE (same session, per client feedback): swapped ALL stock for the client's OWN real photos (pulled 28+ work shots + logo from jtgreenbuilders.co.uk; chose 8 covering bifold/brick/rendered/stone extensions, garden room, resin drives, rooflights; avoided 2 shots containing a worker) and his REAL green+red JTGreen logo in nav/loader/footer (white chip on dark footer); added Loft Conversions service + New Builds emphasis per his services page; hero CTAs shortened to 'Call us'/'WhatsApp' (Justin retained elsewhere) to de-bulk mobile.
